title: cyperus karthikeyanii
intro: Cyperus karthikeyanii is a rare species of sedge that belongs to the family Cyperaceae, commonly found in India. It has been found to possess medicinal properties, including antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial activities. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and treating gastrointestinal disorders. Traditionally, Cyperus karthikeyanii is prepared into herbal preparations such as decoctions, infusions, and ointments to harness its medicinal properties.
